text.title: Requirements Prioritization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the requirements-prioritization methodology end-to-end.

step.name: elicit-weights
step.action: Per-stakeholder weight vector; reconcile to group.

step.name: score
step.action: Apply method scoring; couple value with effort.

step.name: distribution-check
step.action: Verify non-flat distribution; force redistribution if needed.

step.name: publish-record
step.action: Compose PR record with rationale + sign-off.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
